mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 232.34 (current CPIAUCSL value) signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 232.34 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and payrolls indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the interaction term falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day returns show no significant correlation with the combined INDPRO/PAYEMS signal.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate above 7.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns during recessionary regimes.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.5% during confirmed recessions.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing activity, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant negative correlation with INDPRO declines (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts above 1036 thousand units signal improved consumer confidence and demand-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1036 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Positive correlation between retail sales and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the RSAFS/HOUST interaction term falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day returns show no significant correlation with the combined signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in the federal funds rate above 0.15% signals monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns during rate-hike cycles.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 0.15% during confirmed rate-hike periods.
